title: Path to Completeness in Metric Spaces
description: A flowchart illustrating the concept of completeness by showing how Cauchy sequences behave in different types of metric spaces and the properties that result
relationships: In any metric space, every convergent sequence is Cauchy
In a complete metric space, every Cauchy sequence converges to a limit within M
In an incomplete metric space, some Cauchy sequences do not converge to a limit within M
Every metric space can be completed to form a complete metric space M̄ by adding limits of all Cauchy sequences
